arts.ttl: Serie A: Roma vs Lecce – probable line-ups and where to watch on TV
arts.sum: Roma coach Claudio Ranieri will probably have to do without his striker Artem Dovbyk in...

Roma and Lecce are the only two teams in this championship that have yet to find the back of the net in the first 15 minutes of play – the Apulians have scored only two goals in the first half, a negative record both overall and in percentage terms in Serie A this season (29% - 2/7). After losing their first home Serie A match against Lecce on 20 April 1986, Roma are unbeaten in the following 17 (W15 D2), winning all their last seven such matches - the longest ongoing home winning streak for the team from the capital in the competition.
Crisis-ridden Roma hope to turnaround things when they face Lecce at the Stadio Olimpico on Saturday. Roma come into this match on the back of a six-game winless run across…
